form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of five months. Finished off last preparation fourth of 9 at Wingatui November 4 over 1400m, 5.5 len behind Inflamed carrying 56.5kg at $4.40. When resuming last campaign third in a small field at Te Aroha March 29 2025 over 1150m, 2.25 len behind Velocious carrying 55.5kg at $10.90. Shapes as a leading contender.

form.formComment: Most recently held ground to the line 3rd of 7 at Wingatui on March 27 over 1400m, slow going 1.1 len behind Megalomaniac carrying 57.5kg at $4.60. form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after three months second last of 7 at Wingatui on March 27 over 1200m, slow going 1.5 len behind Our Clarry carrying 61kg at $13.50. Previously second-up won by a nose at Ascot Park October 3 over 1400m in heavy going defeating Buoyant with 60.5kg at $4.80. Is a definite threat in this line-up.

form.formComment: Returns from a 29-day let-up. Most recently favourite; won by 1.2 len at this track March 8 over 1200m on a heavy track defeating Industrialist with 59kg at $4.50. The run before that 9th of 13 at Wingatui on February 28 over 1200m, on a slow track; 3.5 len behind Trobriand with 54kg at $52.80. The inside gate brings her right into contention.
